title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.4 — GRIT tiles as WIDE as possible: layoutGrid gained a per-module padX arg; GRIT now uses tight side-padding + gap (6/6) instead of 10/8 so its tiles fill the panel width. Also ParamSlider fills its whole cell now (dropped the old 2px inset that made value tiles read narrower than selector tiles). COMPRESS/AMBER unchanged (10/8). DSP untouched. VERIFY: GRIT's tiles look maximally wide. Then apply the same widen treatment to whichever module is next. Remaining: GRIT deep controls -> TWEAK, AMBER vertical stage-tags, raise bottom section.
